name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, overdesigned look of typical AI tools.
problem: Most AI presentation tools generate slides that look templated, cluttered, and instantly recognisable as machine-made, undermining credibility in professional settings. Teams waste time manually cleaning up AI output to meet brand and design standards. Chronicle 2.0 aims to give users AI speed while preserving visual quality and intentionality.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks that look hand-crafted rather than AI-generated
Creating client-facing strategy presentations with clean, professional aesthetics
Producing internal team briefings and reports quickly without design overhead
Developing sales enablement decks that maintain brand consistency at scale

name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed AI look.
problem: Most AI presentation tools generate slides that look templated, cluttered, and instantly recognisable as machine-made, undermining credibility. Chronicle 2.0 gives users AI assistance for speed while maintaining design quality and visual distinctiveness. This lets teams produce professional presentations faster without sacrificing brand integrity or aesthetic control.
useCases: Creating investor pitch decks that look hand-crafted rather than AI-generated
Building client-facing sales decks with consistent, on-brand visual design
Producing internal strategy or roadmap presentations quickly without a designer
Repurposing written reports or documents into structured slide narratives

name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed AI aesthetic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools churn out visually bland, templated slides that lack originality and require heavy manual cleanup. Chronicle 2.0 addresses the gap between speed and quality by letting teams build visually distinctive presentations with AI assistance that respects design intent. This saves hours of reformatting while avoiding the homogenous look that undermines credibility.
useCases: Creating investor pitch decks that stand out from AI-generated competition
Building client-facing sales presentations with a refined, branded look
Producing internal strategy or roadmap decks quickly without sacrificing visual quality
Enabling non-designers to author professional presentations without design tools expertise

name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentation builder that skips the generic filler and keeps your content sharp.
problem: Most AI presentation tools generate bloated, generic slides that require heavy editing before they look professional. Chronicle 2.0 addresses the gap between fast AI output and polished, on-brand storytelling. It gives teams a way to build compelling decks without sacrificing quality or spending hours cleaning up AI slop.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks with clean, purposeful narratives
Creating client-facing proposals and business presentations
Producing internal strategy or roadmap presentations
Repurposing existing content into structured slide decks quickly

name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Translate on-screen video text without touching your original visuals
problem: Businesses distributing video content globally face the costly, time-consuming task of recreating entire videos to swap out text overlays, titles, and captions for each target language. Rebuilding visuals for every locale strains production budgets and slows time-to-market. Visual Translate automates in-video text translation while preserving the original design and layout.
useCases: Localise marketing video campaigns for multiple regional markets without redesigning assets
Translate product demo or tutorial videos for international onboarding
Adapt social media video content with native-language text overlays at scale
Convert training or compliance videos into multiple languages for global teams

name: Perplexity AI
tagline: The answer engine that always shows its work
problem: Search engines return ten blue links and leave you to read everything yourself. Perplexity reads the web, synthesises the answer, and cites every source — in one shot.
easeLabel: Anyone can use it day one

name: Runway ML
tagline: Hollywood-grade video generation with no film school required
problem: Professional video production demands expensive equipment, skilled editors, and days of post-production. Runway compresses that entire pipeline into a text prompt.

name: Gamma
tagline: Presentations that write and design themselves
problem: Building a deck from scratch burns hours on layout before you get to the thinking. Gamma converts rough notes into a fully designed presentation in under two minutes.
easeLabel: Anyone can use it day one

name: Harvey AI
tagline: The AI legal associate that never sleeps
problem: Legal research, contract drafting, and due diligence are extraordinarily time-intensive and expensive. Harvey is trained on legal datasets and case law to accelerate all three.

name: Cursor
tagline: The code editor where AI is the co-pilot, not a plugin
problem: Traditional AI coding assistants are bolted onto existing editors and only see one open file. Cursor rebuilds the IDE around AI — it understands your entire codebase contextually.

name: ElevenLabs
tagline: Any voice, any language, one click
problem: Professional voice-overs require recording studios, voice talent scheduling, and expensive post-production. ElevenLabs generates hyper-realistic synthetic voices from typed text.

name: Clay
tagline: Your entire sales research pipeline, automated
problem: Sales teams burn hours manually enriching lead data from LinkedIn, company websites, and databases before writing a single outreach email. Clay connects 50+ data sources and does it automatically.

name: Granola
tagline: The meeting notes app that listens so you don't have to
problem: You cannot take great notes and be fully present in a meeting at the same time. Granola transcribes, structures, and summarises every meeting automatically — in the format you want.
easeLabel: Anyone can use it day one

name: Midjourney
tagline: Describe it, see it, own it
problem: Commissioning original visual art or photography is expensive and slow. Midjourney generates commercially usable, high-resolution images from plain-text descriptions in seconds.

name: Descript
tagline: Edit video like a Word doc — because now you can
problem: Video editing has a steep technical curve even for simple corrections. Descript lets you edit video by editing the auto-generated transcript — delete a word, the clip disappears.

name: Notion AI
tagline: Your entire workspace, now with an AI brain
problem: Teams spend enormous time searching across notes, docs, and databases to find context for their work. Notion AI answers questions, summarises pages, and drafts content directly inside your existing workspace.

name: GitHub Copilot
tagline: The AI pair programmer that knows your codebase
problem: Writing boilerplate code, searching documentation, and remembering syntax across languages slows developers down. Copilot suggests entire functions, explains code, and fixes bugs in real time inside your editor.

name: Synthesia
tagline: AI video with a talking presenter — no camera, no crew
problem: Creating professional training or explainer videos with real presenters requires cameras, studios, scripts, and scheduling. Synthesia generates polished videos with AI avatars from a typed script.

name: Jasper
tagline: Enterprise AI writing built for marketing teams
problem: Marketing teams struggle to produce consistent, on-brand content at scale across blog posts, ads, emails, and social. Jasper trains on your brand voice and generates content that sounds like you — at volume.

name: Otter.ai
tagline: Real-time transcription and AI meeting notes for everyone
problem: Following up after meetings is time-consuming because no one captured everything accurately. Otter joins your calls automatically, transcribes in real time, identifies speakers, and generates action items.
easeLabel: Anyone can use it day one

name: Copy.ai
tagline: Go from idea to polished copy in seconds
problem: Blank page paralysis kills marketing momentum. Copy.ai generates first drafts for any format — ads, emails, product descriptions, LinkedIn posts — so your team edits instead of starting from scratch.
easeLabel: Anyone can use it day one

name: HeyGen
tagline: Turn any text into a professional video with an AI avatar
problem: Recording personalised video messages at scale is impossible with a real camera. HeyGen lets you clone your appearance and voice once, then generate unlimited personalised videos from a script.

name: Canva AI
tagline: Professional design for everyone, powered by AI
problem: Creating visually polished graphics, presentations, and marketing materials requires design skills most professionals do not have. Canva's AI tools generate, resize, and brand content automatically for any format.

name: Loom AI
tagline: Record your screen, AI writes the summary and action items
problem: Async communication using video messages is only useful if recipients can quickly find the relevant moment. Loom AI auto-transcribes recordings, generates titles, and creates chapter summaries automatically.
easeLabel: Anyone can use it day one

name: Zapier
tagline: Connect your apps and automate workflows without code
problem: Businesses run on dozens of disconnected tools that do not talk to each other, forcing manual data entry and repetitive tasks. Zapier connects 6,000+ apps and automates workflows between them without any code.

name: Beautiful.ai
tagline: Slides that design themselves as you add content
problem: Traditional presentation software forces you to spend as much time on formatting as on the message. Beautiful.ai uses smart templates that automatically reflow and redesign as you type.
easeLabel: Anyone can use it day one

name: Grammarly
tagline: AI writing assistance that works everywhere you type
problem: Errors in written communication undermine professional credibility. Grammarly catches grammar mistakes, improves clarity, adjusts tone, and now generates full drafts — across every application and browser.

name: Murf AI
tagline: Studio-quality AI voiceovers from your browser
problem: Recording professional voice-overs requires microphones, quiet rooms, editing software, and re-recording every time the script changes. Murf generates natural-sounding voices in 20+ languages that you can update instantly.

name: Pictory
tagline: Turn long-form content into short social videos automatically
problem: Long blog posts, webinars, and podcasts contain enormous value but most audiences never engage with them in full. Pictory extracts the best moments and turns them into short, captioned social media clips.

name: Writesonic
tagline: AI content that ranks — SEO-first writing at scale
problem: Writing SEO-optimised long-form content consistently requires research, keyword integration, and hours of writing. Writesonic generates factually grounded, search-engine-optimised articles in minutes.

name: Airtable
tagline: The spreadsheet that thinks like a database, now with AI
problem: Spreadsheets fall apart as businesses scale — formulas break, collaboration is clunky, and data lives everywhere. Airtable's AI layer builds interfaces, writes formulas, and automates workflows from natural language.

name: Surfer SEO
tagline: Data-driven content that Google actually wants to rank
problem: Creating content that ranks requires deep analysis of what top-ranking pages have in common — word count, keyword density, structure, and more. Surfer analyses all of this and tells writers exactly what to include.

name: Linear
tagline: The issue tracker built for speed with AI built in
problem: Project management tools built for enterprises are too slow and complex for modern software teams. Linear is built for speed — keyboard-first, AI-powered, and designed around how engineering teams actually work.

name: Adobe Firefly
tagline: Commercially safe AI image generation built into Creative Cloud
problem: Most AI image generators are trained on copyrighted images, creating legal risk for commercial use. Adobe Firefly is trained only on licensed content and generates images that are commercially safe to use.

name: Semrush
tagline: The all-in-one marketing intelligence platform with AI
problem: Understanding what competitors are doing online, which keywords are worth targeting, and how to improve your site's visibility requires dozens of tools and hours of analysis. Semrush consolidates all of it.

name: Replit
tagline: Build and deploy software from a browser prompt
problem: Setting up development environments, installing dependencies, and deploying applications takes hours of configuration before you write a single line of business logic. Replit removes all of that entirely.

name: Tome
tagline: AI-native storytelling for modern teams
problem: Traditional slides are linear and static, while modern business storytelling needs to be flexible and visually dynamic. Tome creates narrative-first presentations from a prompt with embedded live data and interactive elements.
easeLabel: Anyone can use it day one

name: Mem AI
tagline: The self-organising workspace that learns from you
problem: Notes and ideas are worthless if you cannot find them when needed. Mem automatically organises everything you write, surfaces related notes when relevant, and answers questions about your own knowledge base.

name: Codeium
tagline: Free AI code completion that works in any editor
problem: Premium AI coding tools cost $10-20 per month per developer — a significant expense for teams and individual contributors. Codeium provides comparable code autocomplete and chat in 70+ languages at no cost.

name: Taskade
tagline: AI agents that plan, research, and execute tasks for you
problem: Managing projects requires coordinating tasks, research, meetings, and documentation across multiple tools. Taskade's AI agents can autonomously research topics, draft documents, and update tasks inside a unified workspace.
